standup.description: Short daily sync (5–15 min). Focus: blockers and coordination, not status reporting.

per_person_template.today: What are you working on today?
per_person_template.blockers: What is blocking you? (write 'None' if nothing)

standup.action_item_owner_rule: Assign blocker resolution to the person best positioned to unblock, not the blocked person.

planning.description: Sprint, quarterly, or project planning session. Focus: scope, priorities, dependencies.
planning.action_item_owner_rule: Assign to the person who accepted the task during the meeting. Mark 'TBD' if ownership was not confirmed.
planning.deadline_default: End of sprint or planning period

retrospective.description: Team reflection on what worked and what to improve. Focus: learning and process improvement.

retro_sections.what_went_well: Positive outcomes, behaviors, and practices to continue
retro_sections.what_to_improve: Issues, friction, and areas needing change
retro_sections.experiments_to_try: Specific, time-boxed process changes to test next sprint

retrospective.action_item_owner_rule: Each improvement item must have exactly one owner. If none is identified, flag as 'Needs owner' and escalate.
retrospective.tone_guidance: Non-judgmental, forward-looking. Avoid naming individuals negatively in summaries.

client_call.description: External call with customer, prospect, or partner. Focus: relationship, commitments, and follow-through.

special_sections.commitments_made: Any promise made to the client — product deliverables, timelines, follow-ups, pricing
special_sections.next_steps_external: What the client agreed to do (send documents, make introductions, etc.)

client_call.sensitivity_note: Do not include internal pricing strategy, internal escalations, or competitive commentary in external follow-up emails.
client_call.action_item_owner_rule: Split action items into 'Our team' and 'Client' tables.
client_call.follow_up_email: always — send within 24 hours of call

executive_sync.description: Leadership alignment meeting. Focus: decisions, escalations, and strategic direction.
executive_sync.brevity_rule: Executive sync summaries should be scannable in under 2 minutes. Use headlines, not paragraphs.
executive_sync.decision_log_priority: Critical — every decision must be captured with the decision-maker's name.
executive_sync.action_item_owner_rule: All action items must have a named owner and a hard deadline.

all_hands.description: Company-wide or team-wide meeting. Focus: announcements, alignment, Q&A.

special_sections.announcements: Key company news, org changes, product launches, policy updates
special_sections.qa_highlights: Significant questions raised and answers given (anonymize if appropriate)

all_hands.action_item_owner_rule: All-hands action items are typically owned by leadership; document with name and ETA.
all_hands.follow_up_email: always — share recording link if available

one_on_one.description: Manager-direct or peer sync. Focus: development, feedback, blockers, and alignment.
one_on_one.privacy_note: 1:1 summaries are private — do not generate follow-up emails for distribution.
one_on_one.action_item_owner_rule: Split into 'manager actions' and 'direct report actions'.

priority_rules.High: Blocks another person or team from proceeding; must be resolved before next work session
priority_rules.Medium: Important for on-time delivery but does not block others today
priority_rules.Low: Nice to have or background task; no immediate downstream impact

deadline_inference_rules.before_next_meeting: Label with the next known meeting date if determinable

owner_inference_rules: Use the last person who spoke about or agreed to the task in the notes
If multiple people are mentioned, assign to the most senior or domain-responsible person
If the task was volunteered by someone, assign it to them
If ownership is completely ambiguous, mark as 'TBD' and flag explicitly

tone_by_type.client_call: professional and prompt — include commitment tracking
tone_by_type.executive_sync: concise and direct — executives scan, not read
tone_by_type.all_hands: informative and inclusive — link to recording
